styles.positive_style_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension
styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents, isolated smoke ball, detached puff, floating smoke orb, explosion, fireball, debris, breakup, painterly abstraction

cases.prompt_body: Three-quarter tower-side liftoff of the Space Shuttle Challenger just clearing the launch platform, fixed service tower, pad deck, orbiter, external tank, and twin boosters remain canonical and fully readable, one asymmetric gray-black smoke field emerges from the right booster aft field-joint area and wraps across the right side of the platform, partially veiling the deck and lower pad structure while the left side stays comparatively open, tail exhaust remains normal, no explosion, no debris, no breakup, pale dawn sky, muted steel, restrained escalation

Frontal launch-platform departure of Challenger with the launch site held as one readable place, tower, deck, orbiter, tank, and boosters remain canonical as the vehicle rises, one dark smoke band connected to the lower right booster joint spreads through the right side of the launch platform and obscures part of the deck environment instead of floating free, engine and booster-tail exhaust stay otherwise routine, no fireball, no catastrophic breakup, no spectacle, cool gray sky, concrete beige, restrained launch tension

Closer site-relation frame of Challenger lifting beside the service structure, the pad, tower, and shuttle stack remain stable and recognizable, one connected charcoal smoke sheet anchored at the right booster aft field-joint area folds downward through the right half of the platform and merges into the pad atmosphere, reducing pad visibility on that side while the stack remains clean and canonical, no explosion, no debris trail, no painterly abstraction, muted blue-gray, bone white, restrained daylight
